summary: Coach Jeux Multi-Items feature testing complete - All backend APIs (11/11) and frontend flows working correctly

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test bons created with TEST_MULTI_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Jeux Multi-Items feature fully implemented and tested. Backend supports items[] array in POST /api/jeux/bons. Frontend CoachJeuxPage has cart with add/remove lines, total calculation, duration sum. JeuxBonsModal shows multi-line bons with purple left border. Attach and Standalone actions work with all items. Legacy bons (jeu_product_id top-level) still compatible via _ensure_items helper.
